div2.head: Changes between MathML 2.0 and MathML 2.0 Second Edition

item.p: Changes to frontmatter.
New text in and .
Changes to .
Additional markup for bibliographic references in and .
Changes to .
Modify description of namespace declarations in .
Modify description of entity usage in .
Correct the MathML and default rendering of quatratic formula example in .
Wording changes in .
Changes to .
Delete incorrect reference to default em units in .
Delete references to Negative Space Characters in and .
Editorial changes to the wording in .
Correct description of lspace value in .
Add warning that attempts to render outside the bounding box of the MathML expression will give implemetation specific results in .
Modify text to match example and refer to over brace rather than over bar in .
Correct description of displaystyle in (may be set on mtable).
Extend the description of to clarify that the list of notations is open-ended, and extend the example list to include boxes and strikeouts of various forms.
The example in this section omitted units in the columnspacing and rowspacing attributes.
Correct the example MathML in .
Correct the description of minlabelspacing and include mlabeledtr in list of elements with inferred mrows in .
Clarify rowspan and columnspan must be positive integers in .
Correct the description the linebreak attribute in .
Editorial changes to the text in , , , , , , , and .
Clarification that the fontfamily attribute of mglyph is not deprecated in .
Editorial changes to the description of MathML conformance, and deletion of the non normative and unsupported menu action type in .
Addition of a tail to the image for U+2910, and swapping the images for the lowercase phi variants, U+03D5 and U+03C6.
Changes to .
Add comment about use of semantics in .

Modify description of the definitionURL attribute in ,
to be consistent with the DTD with regard to the type attribute.
Modify description of the type attribute in .
Add clarifying comments on the attributes allowed on declare and give new extended example in .
Editorial correction to text in and .
New text clarifying the use of tendsto in .
Clarifying the use of definitionURL and encoding attributes with annotation in and .
New text highlighting the fact that vector may be rendered either horizontally or vertically in .

The descriptions of the "scientific, or e notation" (1.234e5) in , and Appendices C and D became inconsistent in the final draft of MathML2. The older names float and floating-point remained, and the description of type="e-notation" in Chapter 4 (but not Appendix C) described its use with the example 1.234 e 5 where e was used as a separator rather than the sep element
Correct the example MathML in .
Add note to observing that the mathematical expressions in the examples are false.
Clarify that the order of child elements of bvar is not signifcant in .
Correct the example of OpenMath usage in in , , and .
Clarification on the use of bound variables in in , , , , , and .
Clarification of the examples of the deprecated fn element in , , and .
Clarification that piecewice may be used with no piece children in .
Use the MathML2 pi element in the example in .
Modify example of the constant type in .
Expand and clarify the use of qualifier elements such as bvar in .
Delete misleading references to declare in bvar in and .
Clarify the description of the condition element in , especially its relationship to domainofapplication.
Make explict that domainofapplication is a qualifier element in
Clarify the use of the set and condition elements to specify a set as a range of a function over a given domain in (and similarly in ).
Clarify the description of the use of domainofapplication with sum in and .
Show the full equation, not just the left hand side, in the example rendering in .
Note fn is deprecated in .
Editorial changes in .
Deletion of the stated restriction that the element may only appear as a child of apply or reln in .
Clarify that qualifiers may be used with all n-ary operators in .
Clarification of the use of qualifier elements with csymbol and ci in .
Clarification of the use of qualifier elements in in , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , .
Additional example, showing the use of bvar in .
Alternative renderings using nabla added in , and .
Editorial changes to clarify the allowed arguments in .
Correct the example renderings in and .
Editorial additions clarifying the intended use of encoding in .
Correct the example rendering in .
Changes to .
Editorial corrections to text in .
Correct the complexity of parallel markup given in to O(n log n).
Modify the example rendering image to include both sides of the equivalence expression in .
Add bibiographic reference to the OpenMath Standard in .
Correct the example MathML in .
Changes to .
Editorial changes to , especially .
Delete references to (deprecated) negative and other spacing characters in the table in .
Delete reference to possible Unicode characters for Boolean values as these were not in the final set of characters added at Unicode 3.2, .
Some changes in to document the current usage of combining characters which have been brought into line with the final versions of Unicode 3.2.
Changes to , , , , , , and , to reflect Unicode 3.1 and 3.2 which were both released after the first edition of MathML 2.0.
Editorial changes to the description of mglyph in .
Changes to .
Deleted reference to non-conforming namespace behavior in some existing systems in .
Editorial changes to .
Change reference to XLink which is now a W3C Recommendation, .
New section, giving an example integrating with SVG.
Additional markup for bibliographic references in .
Editorial changes to description of MathML processors in .
New section describing (existing) extension mechanisms in MathML 2, .
Editorial changes to use consistent terminology to describe conformance criteria for MathML processors in , , , and .
Changes to .
New section, describing use without a DTD.
The location of the MathML DTDs described in and are now in the Math Working group area rather than distributed with this Recommendation.
New sections descriping parameterisation possibilities for the DTD: and .
In , the link to the W3C Note on SGML and XML has been corrected and changed to a bibliography reference.
The MathML DTD as shown in Incorporates several corrections as listed in the MathML 2.0 Errata document, or listed in the change log at the end of the DTD.
New section, describing the use of the W3C XML Schema for MathML.
Changes to .
Many corrections, and new display format for the productions given in the grammar for Content Markup in .
Changes to .
Clarify the use of definitionURL in .
Changes to .

Corrections to the following interfaces: MathMLPresentationToken, MathMLContentToken, MathMLSpaceElement, MathMLOperatorElement, MathMLStyleElement, MathMLFencedElement, MathMLFractionElement, MathMLContentElement, MathMLIntervalElement, MathMLApplyElement, MathMLEncloseElement, MathMLActionElement, MathMLTableRowElement, MathMLCnElement, MathMLCiElement, MathMLTendsToElement.
Modification of the description of tendsto in .
Changes to .
Blank lines in used in the inferred mrow grouping algorithm were omitted. They have been restored based on the groupings in MathML 1.01.
Some entity names in have been corrected and/or deleted to match the names in the MathML DTD.
Changes to .
Document changes in Working Group membership in .
Editorial changes in .
Changes to .
New section describing changes in the Second Edition.
Minor edits to the description of the earlier changes in .
Changes to .
Added and updated many entries: , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , .
Changes to .
New Appendix incorporating and

changes to
rewritten to reflect developments since publication of the MathML 1.0 Recommendation , for example XML, XSL, CSS and schemas

changes to
rewritten to reflect developments since publication of the MathML 1.0 Recommendation , for example XML, XSL, CSS and schemas
examples were rewritten to reflect good MathML 2.0 practice
descriptions of attribute values were updated to reflect MathML 2.0

changes to
introduced a new section on bidirectional layout of mathematics
introduced new mathematics style attributes mathvariant, mathsize, mathweight, and mathcolor on token elements, and deprecated the use of fontfamily, fontsize, fontweight, fontstyle and color.
introduced new elements mglyph, menclose and mlabeledtr and updated related text accordingly
added attributes beveled, numalign and denomalign to mfrac
added a linebreaking attribute to mspace
required mtr and mtd elements to be explicit instead of allowing them to be inferred.

changes to
deprecated the use of reln and fn and changed the use of apply accordingly
introduced csymbol and added a discussion about the relation to the deprecated fn element
introduced new content elements domain, codomain, image, domainofapplication, arg, real, imaginary, lcm, floor, ceiling, equivalent, approx, divergence, grad, curl, laplacian, card, cartesianproduct, momentabout, vectorproduct, scalarproduct, outerproduct, integers, reals, rationals, naturalnumbers, complexes, primes, exponentiale, imaginaryi, notanumber, true, false, emptyset, pi, eulergamma, infinity, piecewise, piece and otherwise
corrected examples and fixed typos
expanded the attribute definitionURL to allow a URL or a URI as a value
clarified the use of presentation markup inside cn
made use of encoding attribute more uniform
changed description of the use of bvar in combination with min and max

changes to
added description of content-faithful transformation
updated examples to reflect MathML 2.0
define list of content that can appear in presentation
add attribute xref for cross-referencing purposes
added examples using XLink and namespaces
make use of encoding attribute more uniform
miscellaneous typographical corrections

changes to
added a new section describing the methods of using Unicode data within MathML
added a new section describing the correspondence between Math Alphabet characters and the mathvariant attribute
completely revised and reformatted the MathML character tables to reflect changes in Unicode since MathML 1.01

changes to
reworked the text in acknowledgement of the fact that the top-level and interface elements for MathML are now in practice the same
rewrote the text about linking to reflect changes in XLink since MathML 1.01
revised material about interactions with embedded renderers to reflect the current state of DOM implementation
added a definition of deprecated features in MathML 2
updated the text to reflect the use of namespaces and the introduction of XHTML. 2.0
added a new section on the appropriate use of CSS and the new mathematics style attributes in rendering environments with support CSS

changes to
this is a completely new chapter

changes to
renamed attribute occurence to occurrence
added global attribute xref
add links to tables for each entity set

changes to
Updated to reflect MathML 2.0.

changes to
completely rewritten to reflect changes in MathML 2.0

changes to
entries in operator dictionary are parametrized
operator dictionary has become a non-normative part of the specification
new entries were added to operator dictionary

changes to
this is a completely new appendix, containing the IDL definitions

changes to
added entries for XSL, XSLT and XSL FO

changes to
all members of first and second Math Working Group are listed

changes to
completely new appendix, based on the logs obtained from CVS

changes to
added and updated many entries

general changes
text of specification now in XML form, with HTML and XHTML rendering by means of XSLT, and PDF rendering by means of XSLT and &TeX;
fixed errors in spelling and notation
normative examples of formulas are images, with a La&TeX; equivalent
non-normative examples of formulas are HTML constructions wherever possible
improved cross-referencing
